title: Bouygues-led consortium signs $23.44 billion deal to buy SFR from Altice France
summary: A Bouygues-led consortium is acquiring SFR from Altice France for $23.44 billion, pending regulatory approval. If completed, this would rank among the largest European telecom deals in recent years and reshape France's telecommunications landscape.
content: If approved by regulators, the Bouygues-led acquisition would rank among the biggest European telecoms deals in recent years.

zh.title: 博洛雷集团牵头财团签署234.4亿美元协议收购法国阿尔蒂斯的SFR
zh.summary: 博洛雷集团领导的财团以234.4亿美元从法国阿尔蒂斯公司收购SFR，待监管部门批准。交易完成后，这将成为近年来欧洲电信业最大的交易之一，重塑法国电信市场格局。

title: A new wave of weight-loss therapies aims to be better than today’s GLP-1s
summary: Retatrutide, a next-generation weight-loss drug, demonstrated superior clinical trial results compared to current GLP-1 medications, with added benefits including improved sleep apnea and reduced knee pain. The advancement represents a new wave of obesity treatments moving beyond existing therapies.
content: Retatrutide is one of those drugs. It helped people lose a massive amount of weight in clinical trials. It also improved sleep apnea and knee pain.

zh.title: 新一代减肥疗法旨在超越当今的GLP-1药物
zh.summary: 下一代减肥药物Retatrutide在临床试验中表现优于现有的GLP-1药物，并具有改善睡眠呼吸暂停和减轻膝盖疼痛的额外益处。这一进展代表了新一波肥胖症治疗方法的到来，超越了现有疗法。

title: Most robo-advisers will never profit from Wall Street’s AI-generated stock picks
summary: Robo-advisors cannot consistently generate market-beating returns from AI-generated stock picks despite their value in tax-loss harvesting and portfolio discipline. The limitations highlight the gap between AI stock selection and actual profitability for retail investors.
content: Retail robo-advisors excel at tax-loss harvesting and portfolio discipline, but market-beating returns aren’t part of the package.

zh.title: 大多数机器人顾问无法从华尔街的AI选股中获利
zh.summary: 机器人顾问无法从AI生成的选股中持续产生战胜市场的回报，尽管它们在税务损失收割和投资组合纪律方面具有价值。这些局限性凸显了AI选股与零售投资者实际盈利能力之间的差距。

title: U.S. confirms second Texas screwworm case, Canada restricts livestock imports
summary: The U.S. has confirmed a second case of New World screwworm in Texas, prompting Canada to restrict livestock imports from the region. Screwworms feed on living tissue and can be fatal to warm-blooded animals, posing a significant threat to livestock industries and food supply chains.
content: New World screwworm larvae feed on the living tissue of warm-blooded animals, creating severe wounds that can be fatal if left untreated.

zh.title: 美国确认德州第二例美洲蝇蛆病病例，加拿大限制牲畜进口
zh.summary: 美国在德州确认了第二例新大陆蝇蛆病病例，促使加拿大限制该地区的牲畜进口。蝇蛆以活组织为食，对温血动物可能致命，对畜牧业和食品供应链构成重大威胁。

title: You’re going to pay tax on RMDs — there’s no way around it. Or is there?
summary: Required Minimum Distributions are taxable regardless of circumstances, but taxpayers have strategies to minimize their tax impact on retirement savings. The article outlines new approaches to protect retirement cash from excessive taxation.
content: Here’s your new playbook to protect your retirement cash.

zh.title: 你必须为必需最低提取额（RMD）缴税——真的没有办法规避吗？
zh.summary: 无论情况如何，必需最低提取额（RMD）都需要缴税，但纳税人有策略可以最小化对退休储蓄的税收影响。文章概述了保护退休资金免受过度征税的新方法。

title: White House AI policy adviser Krishnan to leave position
summary: White House AI policy adviser Krishnan is departing his position overseeing the Trump administration's national AI regulatory framework. His departure marks a potential shift in how the administration approaches AI policy development.
content: Krishnan has been involved in Trump administration efforts to create a national framework for regulating AI developments.

zh.title: 白宫人工智能政策顾问克里希南离职
zh.summary: 白宫人工智能政策顾问克里希南正在离开其监督特朗普政府国家AI监管框架的职位。他的离职标志着政府在AI政策发展方面可能出现转变。

title: Wall Street hated these 15 stocks. Then their earnings proved the analysts wrong.
summary: Fifteen stocks that Wall Street analysts were pessimistic about delivered strong earnings surprises that exceeded expectations. These earnings beats demonstrate that overlooked companies with strong fundamentals can outperform analyst predictions.
content: Earnings beats mean a lot more when it happens to stocks the market gave up on.

zh.title: 华尔街看衰的15只股票，它们的财报却证明分析师错了
zh.summary: 华尔街分析师看衰的15只股票发布了超出预期的强劲财报。这些盈利超预期的表现证明，那些被忽视但基本面强劲的公司能够超越分析师的预测。

title: Don’t rule out a ‘June swoon’ — the S&P 500 is pushing its limits
summary: The S&P 500 is approaching historical resistance levels and could be vulnerable to a June market downturn despite recent strength. Even positive earnings reports from major companies may not be enough to sustain the current rally.
content: Even upbeat Oracle earnings next week might not be enough to rally the market.

zh.title: 别排除"六月暴跌"风险——标普500指数逼近极限
zh.summary: 标普500指数接近历史阻力位，尽管近期表现强劲，但可能面临六月市场下跌的风险。即使来自大公司的正面财报也可能不足以维持当前的上升势头。

title: Here are 3 forces that drove a whirlwind week for the stock market
summary: The stock market experienced dramatic swings this week, with a sharp selloff on Friday reversing earlier gains that had reached record highs. The volatility was driven by three major forces impacting investor sentiment and market direction.
content: An avalanche of selling on Friday crushed stocks. It was a dramatic reversal from record highs earlier in the week.

zh.title: 推动股市剧烈波动的3大力量
zh.summary: 股市本周经历了剧烈波动，周五的急剧下跌逆转了之前创纪录高位的涨幅。这种波动由影响投资者情绪和市场走向的三大力量驱动。

title: Silicon Valley was built on public money — now it’s fighting California’s billionaire tax
summary: Silicon Valley tech leaders, who benefited from publicly-funded research and infrastructure, are opposing California's proposed billionaire tax. The opposition reflects a belief among tech elites that taxation should apply differently to the wealthy.
content: “Cyberselfish” author says tech elite believe that taxes are for “little people.”

zh.title: 硅谷由公共资金建立——现在它正在对抗加州的亿万富翁税
zh.summary: 从公共资助研究和基础设施中受益的硅谷科技领袖正在反对加州提议的亿万富翁税。这种反对反映了科技精英认为税收应该对富人有所不同的信念。

title: SpaceX, Anthropic and other mega-IPOs could leave your index fund completely out of luck
summary: Upcoming mega-IPOs from companies like SpaceX and Anthropic could dramatically shift the composition of index funds based on when these companies are added. Index fund investors may miss out on significant early gains from these highly anticipated public offerings.
content: Index rules and timelines will divide winners and losers.

zh.title: SpaceX、Anthropic等超大型IPO可能让你的指数基金完全错过机会
zh.summary: 来自SpaceX和Anthropic等公司的即将到来的超大型首次公开募股可能会根据这些公司何时被纳入而大幅改变指数基金的构成。指数基金投资者可能会错过这些备受期待的首次公开募股带来的显著早期收益。

title: The Fed can’t protect consumers from supply shocks and price gouging — but Congress can
summary: The Federal Reserve's tools are limited in addressing supply-driven inflation and price gouging, placing responsibility on Congress to implement protective measures. Lawmakers must take action as global disruptions continue driving up prices for essential goods.
content: As global disruptions drive up Americans’ grocery and gasoline prices, lawmakers need to take a stand.

zh.title: 美联储无法保护消费者免受供应冲击和价格欺诈——但国会可以
zh.summary: 美联储的工具在解决供应驱动的通胀和价格欺诈方面能力有限，这将保护消费者的责任放在国会身上以实施保护措施。随着全球中断继续推高基本商品价格，立法者必须采取行动。

title: Chinese EVs may hit U.S. within a few years, one way or another
summary: Chinese electric vehicle manufacturers are likely to enter the U.S. market within years despite existing tariffs and industry opposition. The advancement of Chinese EV technology suggests regulatory barriers may not prevent market entry indefinitely.
content: Chinese electric vehicles are likely to be sold in the U.S. within years, despite tariffs, strict laws and opposition from the auto industry and politicians.

zh.title: 中国电动汽车可能在几年内进入美国市场
zh.summary: 尽管存在现有关税和行业反对，中国电动汽车制造商可能在几年内进入美国市场。中国电动汽车技术的进步表明，监管障碍可能无法永久阻止市场准入。

title: Remote work career risks for Gen Z are 'subtle, but material,' Harvard professor says: How to avoid the pitfalls
summary: Harvard research indicates that remote work poses subtle but significant career risks for Gen Z workers, including reduced networking and advancement opportunities. Young workers can mitigate these 'scarring' effects by strategically balancing remote and office time.
content: Forgoing the office can have detrimental "scarring" impacts on young workers. Here's how to navigate the benefits and drawbacks of remote work.

zh.title: 哈佛教授称：远程工作对Z世代职业生涯的风险是"微妙但实质性的"——如何避免陷阱
zh.summary: 哈佛研究表明，远程工作对Z世代工作者构成微妙但显著的职业风险，包括网络联系和晋升机会的减少。年轻工作者可以通过战略性地平衡远程和办公室工作时间来缓解这些"伤痕"影响。

title: Bitcoin is cratering, but a new Wall Street crypto hype is on the rise
summary: Bitcoin has fallen to its lowest levels since 2024, but investor attention is shifting to HYPE ETFs linked to hyperliquid crypto platforms. The shift reflects Wall Street's continued search for crypto-related investment opportunities despite bitcoin's decline.
content: As bitcoin dropped to its lowest price since 2024, investors flock to a new type of crypto investment linked to the hyperliquid platforms, HYPE ETFs.

zh.title: 比特币暴跌，但华尔街新的加密货币热潮正在上升
zh.summary: 比特币已跌至2024年以来的最低水平，但投资者的注意力正在转向与超流动性加密平台相关的HYPE ETF。这一转变反映了华尔街在比特币下跌的情况下继续寻求加密相关投资机会。

title: How ‘Backrooms’ producer Peter Chernin thinks Hollywood needs to change
summary: Producer Peter Chernin argues that Hollywood needs to pivot toward original content and away from franchise fatigue as younger audiences demand fresh ideas. The shift reflects changing consumer preferences and box office trends favoring innovation over repetition.
content: Franchise fatigue could drive an entertainment industry sea change as the appetite for fresh ideas grows and younger audiences make up more box office sales.

zh.title: 《后室》制片人彼得·切尔宁认为好莱坞需要如何改变
zh.summary: 制片人彼得·切尔宁辩称,好莱坞需要转向原创内容,远离系列电影疲劳,因为年轻观众需要新想法。这一转变反映了不断变化的消费者偏好和票房趋势,倾向于创新而非重复。

title: Wall Street's 'fear gauge' punches back as the 'crash up' in chip stocks finally reverses
summary: The VIX 'fear gauge' is finally reflecting volatility as the impressive rally in semiconductor stocks hit resistance and reversed on Friday. The correction signals that chip stock valuations may have gotten ahead of underlying fundamentals.
content: The monster rally in semiconductor stocks hit a wall on Friday, and the VIX at last caught up with other volatility metrics.

zh.title: 随着芯片股的"暴涨"最终反转,华尔街的"恐惧指标"反弹
zh.summary: VIX"恐惧指标"正在反映波动性,因为令人印象深刻的半导体股反弹周五遇到阻力并反转。这次调整表明芯片股估值可能超越了基本面。

title: These are the most overbought stocks after a volatile week
summary: After a volatile trading week, several stocks including Hewlett Packard Enterprise have reached overbought technical levels. These stocks may be due for pullbacks as traders reassess valuations following rapid gains.
content: Hewlett Packard Enterprise was among this week's most overbought stocks.

zh.title: 这些是经历波动一周后最超买的股票
zh.summary: 经历波动的交易周后,包括惠普企业在内的多只股票已达到超买技术水平。随着交易者在快速上涨后重新评估估值,这些股票可能面临回调。

title: Bank of America says these 'compelling' stocks are going higher
summary: Bank of America identified a set of stocks deemed too attractive to overlook, reflecting optimistic views on select equity opportunities. The recommendation highlights BofA's positive market outlook for these companies.
content: Bank of America named a slew of stocks that are too attractive to ignore.

zh.title: 美国银行表示这些"吸引力强"的股票将进一步上涨
zh.summary: 美国银行确定了一组被认为不可忽视的吸引力强股票，反映了对特定股票机会的乐观看法。该建议强调了美银对这些公司的积极市场前景。

title: Abel goes his own way with new Berkshire investments, including billions for AI
summary: New Berkshire Hathaway CEO Greg Abel is executing his first major investment deal, including billions allocated to artificial intelligence. The move signals a potential shift in Berkshire's investment strategy under new leadership.
content: Warren Buffett tells CNBC's Becky Quick new Berkshire Hathaway CEO Greg Abel has "launched" with his first major deal.

zh.title: Abel走自己的路，进行新的伯克希尔投资，包括数十亿美元的人工智能投资
zh.summary: 伯克希尔哈撒韦新任首席执行官Greg Abel正在执行他的第一笔重大投资交易，包括分配给人工智能的数十亿美元。这一举动表明伯克希尔在新领导下可能改变其投资战略。

title: Can SpaceX live up to Wall Street’s multitrillion-dollar hype?
summary: As SpaceX approaches its most significant public offering, Wall Street analysts are questioning whether the company can deliver on ambitious valuation projections worth trillions of dollars. The company's "moonshot" goals and future revenue expectations face skepticism from financial experts.
content: As SpaceX prepares for the biggest public debut in history, some analysts warn that the company’s “moonshot” projections could fall short.

zh.title: SpaceX能否满足华尔街的数万亿美元期待？
zh.summary: 随着SpaceX接近其最重要的公开募股，华尔街分析师质疑该公司是否能交付价值数万亿美元的雄心勃勃的估值预期。该公司的"登月"目标和未来收入预期面临金融专家的怀疑。

title: Inside the Obama-era Iran nuclear deal that Trump withdrew from
summary: Ongoing negotiations between the U.S. and Iran over nuclear matters remain unresolved despite recent signals of progress from the Trump administration. The two countries have not yet reached a peace agreement or concrete steps to address Iran's nuclear ambitions.
content: The U.S. and Iran have yet to reach a peace deal or address Iran's nuclear ambitions, despite signals from Trump that talks are progressing.

zh.title: 特朗普退出的奥巴马时代伊朗核协议内幕
zh.summary: 美国与伊朗关于核事务的持续谈判仍未解决，尽管特朗普政府最近发出了进展信号。两国尚未达成和平协议或采取具体措施来解决伊朗的核野心。

title: America’s crude inventories are getting perilously low. But that’s not the full story.
summary: U.S. commercial oil inventories have fallen to critical levels amid an ongoing conflict with Iran entering its fourth month with no clear resolution in sight. The situation creates uncertainty about crude supply and potential impacts on energy prices and inflation.
content: U.S. commercial oil inventories may be too low for comfort as the war with Iran enters its fourth month far from a clear resolution — and a lot is riding on how much longer the conflict drags on.

zh.title: 美国原油库存正在危险地下降。但这不是全部真相。
zh.summary: 美国商业石油库存在与伊朗持续冲突期间下降到临界水平，冲突已进入第四个月且没有明确的解决方案。这种局面对原油供应和能源价格及通胀的潜在影响造成了不确定性。

title: Pope, in Spain, says world crying for peace, urges leaders to temper divisions
summary: Pope Leo visited Spain and called on world leaders to reduce divisions and prioritize respect for human life in pursuit of global peace. Speaking from Rome, the pontiff emphasized his mission to set an example of human dignity for the international community.
content: Speaking aboard the flight to Madrid from Rome, Leo said he was making his visit to set a good example to the world about respect for human life.

zh.title: 教宗在西班牙表示世界渴求和平，促请领导人缓解分歧
zh.summary: 教宗利奥访问西班牙，呼吁世界各国领导人减少分歧，优先尊重人类生命以追求全球和平。这位教宗从罗马强调了他为国际社会树立人类尊严榜样的使命。

title: Apple’s WWDC will be a make-or-break moment for the company’s fledgling AI strategy
summary: Apple's upcoming WWDC keynote represents a crucial moment to demonstrate meaningful improvements to Siri and establish credibility for its artificial intelligence strategy. The company aims to prove it can deliver smarter, more contextually aware AI features after previous attempts failed to impress users.
content: At Monday’s keynote, Apple will get a second chance to show users it can make Siri smarter and more contextually aware.

zh.title: 苹果WWDC将成为其新兴AI战略的决定性时刻
zh.summary: 苹果即将举行的WWDC主题演讲代表了一个关键时刻，以展示对Siri的有意义改进并为其人工智能战略建立信誉。该公司旨在证明其能够提供更智能、更具上下文感知的AI功能，打破之前未能打动用户的局面。

title: U.S. attacks Iranian sites after Iran launches drones, in latest Gulf flare-up
summary: The U.S. conducted retaliatory strikes against Iranian surveillance facilities on the Strait of Hormuz following Iranian drone attacks, marking the latest military escalation in the region. The exchange underscores deepening tensions and military posturing between the two nations.
content: U.S. Central Command said in a post on X that the U.S. then struck Iran's surveillance sites in Goruk and Qeshm Island, which are both on the Strait of Hormuz.

zh.title: 伊朗发射无人机后，美国袭击伊朗目标，引发波斯湾最新冲突
zh.summary: 美国对伊朗在荷莫兹海峡的监视设施进行了报复性打击，此前伊朗发动了无人机攻击，标志着该地区最新的军事升级。这次交换突显了两国之间日益加剧的紧张局势和军事对峙。

title: Best mortgage lenders for bad credit in June 2026
summary: Mortgage lenders offer financing options designed for borrowers with poor credit scores, making homeownership achievable for those with credit challenges. Programs exist to help individuals overcome credit obstacles to achieve their goal of buying a home.
content: Having less-than-perfect credit doesn't have to be an obstacle to homeownership.

zh.title: 2026年6月最适合不良信用借款人的抵押贷款机构
zh.summary: 抵押贷款机构为信用评分较低的借款人提供专门设计的融资选择，使那些面临信用挑战的人能够实现购房目标。存在各种计划帮助个人克服信用障碍，实现购房梦想。

title: The key to the upcoming Fed meeting? How Warsh reacts to all the hints of a rate hike.
summary: The newly appointed Federal Reserve chair may implement substantial changes to how the central bank communicates about interest rates and monetary policy to financial markets. Market observers are closely watching how the leadership transition affects Fed signaling on potential rate hikes.
content: The new Fed chair might make swift changes to how the central bank communicates.

zh.title: 美联储即将召开会议的关键是什么？Warsh如何回应加息信号
zh.summary: 新任联邦储备委员会主席可能会对中央银行向金融市场传达利率和货币政策的方式进行重大改革。市场观察人士正密切关注领导层过渡如何影响美联储关于潜在加息的信号传导。

title: ‘He’s very short-tempered’: My husband won’t sell his home so we can combine our finances and live in comfort. Am I unreasonable?
summary: A woman seeks relationship advice after her husband refuses to sell his home to combine their finances and establish a shared residence 20 miles closer to her. The disagreement highlights tensions between personal preferences and joint financial goals in the marriage.
content: “Our homes are 20 miles apart, and he still drives back and forth almost daily.”

zh.title: '他脾气非常暴躁'：我丈夫拒绝出售他的房子，所以我们无法合并财务和舒适生活。我过分吗？
zh.summary: 一位女性在丈夫拒绝出售他的房子以合并他们的财务并建立一个离她更近的共同住所后寻求婚姻建议。这种分歧突出了婚姻中个人偏好与共同财务目标之间的矛盾。

title: Russia's Sechin says U.S. companies benefit from the closure of the Strait of Hormuz
summary: Russia's Sechin argues that U.S. companies are benefiting from closures of the Strait of Hormuz, which have driven oil prices to multi-year highs and fueled global inflation. The geopolitical disruption is rattling global markets and undermining economic growth worldwide.
content: The closures of the Strait has rattled global markets, sending oil prices to multi-year highs, stoking global inflation and undermining economic growth.

zh.title: 俄罗斯谢钦称美国公司从霍尔木兹海峡关闭中受益
zh.summary: 俄罗斯谢钦辩称，美国公司正从霍尔木兹海峡的关闭中受益，这些关闭已推高油价至多年高位，加剧了全球通胀。地缘政治混乱正冲击全球市场，削弱全球经济增长。

title: Advice service demand rises amid housing crisis
summary: Citizens Advice Guernsey reports increased demand for its services as housing costs and cost-of-living pressures mount. The rising demand reflects broader economic challenges affecting residents' ability to afford housing and meet basic expenses.
content: Citizens Advice Guernsey says housing and cost of living pressures have increased demand.

zh.title: 住房危机中咨询服务需求上升
zh.summary: 根西岛公民咨询机构报告称，随着住房成本和生活成本压力增加，该机构服务需求上升。需求增加反映了更广泛的经济挑战，影响了居民负担住房和维持基本开支的能力。

title: Social media bans on teens risk strengthening Big Tech's grip on the sector, Bluesky exec warns
summary: Bluesky's COO Rose Wang warns that proposed social media bans on teens could paradoxically strengthen major tech companies' market dominance. She argues such restrictions make it nearly impossible for smaller, healthier alternative platforms to compete and gain users.
content: "We're living in a world where it's almost impossible for smaller entrants to come in and build healthier spaces," Bluesky's COO, Rose Wang, told CNBC.

zh.title: Bluesky高管警告：对青少年的社交媒体禁令可能加强大科技公司的垄断
zh.summary: Bluesky首席运营官Rose Wang警告称，拟议的对青少年的社交媒体禁令可能会矛盾地加强主要科技公司的市场主导地位。她辩称此类限制使较小的、更健康的替代平台几乎不可能竞争和获得用户。
